This Valentine’s Day was a memorable one as MRU finally hit its nationwide goal of having MRU products adopted by 25% of U.S. high schools by the year 2025. (See our final MRU Adoption & Market Share map for 2-14-25.)
Great work, bravo!
|
By Tyler Cowen on March 25, 2025
|
This Valentine’s Day was a memorable one as MRU finally hit its nationwide goal of having MRU products adopted by 25% of U.S. high schools by the year 2025. (See our final[ MRU Adoption & Market Share map](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=79c3319411fade7e8feb48bda16f5fcdcce70ae87253c239147b32882bed3b83&blog_id=42693868&post_id=90274&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=c2bc406d5cb0af56b833e5bba61d76ef&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=ecbf3bdd30aaccc2324bdfce8f0a48ac) for 2-14-25.)
Great work, bravo!
|
|
|
